title: OpenRaft Migration Phase 1 Complete
description: Migration from raft-rs to openraft. Phase 1 complete: in-memory storage with 143 tests. Remaining: network layer, node integration, testing, docs.
close_reason: Phase 1 complete: in-memory storage with 143 tests passing

title: gRPC Network Layer
description: gRPC transport for OpenRaft RPC (RequestVote, AppendEntries, InstallSnapshot). Port 7379. Enables multi-node cluster communication.

title: RocksDB Storage Layer
description: Persistent storage with RocksDB. 6 column families for Raft log, state, and KV data. Enables crash recovery and production deployment.

title: KV Service Layer
description: Redis-compatible KV service (GET, SET, DEL, EXISTS, PING). Wire RESP protocol to RaftNode. Port 6379. Depends on: gRPC network + RocksDB storage.
